underlying_goal: Execute GSDR workflow phases (3 and 4) for an F1 modeling project — discuss, plan, and execute phase deliverables
friction_detail: Claude began Phase 4 workflow when the roadmap explicitly required Phase 3.1 next, prompting user to interrupt with 'wait hold on were we supposed to do 3.1'
brief_summary: User ran GSDR phase workflows for an F1 modeling project; Phase 3 completed successfully end-to-end with verified deliverables, but Claude skipped Phase 3.1 and started Phase 4, requiring user correction.
